{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mercy's brother
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy's brother]] has reached the [[Underlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
